nodes.label: Step-6 Codex adversarial review (pass 2)
nodes.author: Codex
nodes.rationale: Verdict: needs-attention. No-ship: the plan relied on a one-mode local validation for a store-specific digest risk, and the code diff regressed honest isolation reporting.

nodes.label: High finding: digest proof gate only validates the current image-store mode
nodes.author: Codex
nodes.rationale: Docker Desktop classic vs containerd image stores can resolve manifest-list refs differently; validating only the mode this machine happens to be in leaves the other supported mode claimed but untested — users there could follow the exact documented command and still fail preflight.

nodes.label: Medium finding: naive.py spawn failure reports isolation="false"
nodes.author: Codex
nodes.rationale: A working-tree edit made NaiveBackend return isolation="false" on FileNotFoundError — not a valid enum value, and selection/server logic keys safety behavior off exact isolation strings. Fix: restore isolation="none" and add a regression test.
